steps.name: Type 'İstanbul Avrupa' into element: By.id: origin-input
Click on element: By.cssSelector: div[class='departure group']
Check if element is displayed: By.id: quick-filters-container
Select random element from list: By.cssSelector: li[class='journey journey-domestic item   ']
Select random available seat for gender: FEMALE
Get text from element: By.cssSelector: div[class='price ']>span>span
Get text from element: By.cssSelector: li.journey.journey-domestic.item.open.success > div > div.trip.col > div.route.down > span.origin.location
Get text from element: By.cssSelector: li.journey.journey-domestic.item.open.success > div > div.trip.col > div.route.down > span.destination.location
Check if element is displayed: By.id: pay
Get text from element: By.cssSelector: tbody > tr:nth-child(2) > td:nth-child(1)
Get text from element: By.cssSelector: tbody > tr:nth-child(2) > td:nth-child(2)
Get text from element: By.id: amount
